product_overview: Little Smart Genius is a static, AI-driven educational blog. This PRD covers the reader-facing author discovery experience: browsing an authors directory and viewing individual author profiles and their articles.
core_goals: Allow readers to discover and browse all site authors through a centralized directory.
Enable readers to open an author profile to read the author's biography and view that author's collection of articles.
Make it easy for readers to navigate between the directory and individual author pages to find relevant educational content.
Present author and article information in a fast, static HTML experience optimized for reading and discovery.

features.name: View Authors Directory
features.description: Readers can open a centralized directory that lists all authors and choose an author to inspect further.
user_flows: Navigate to /authors/ -> View author listings -> Select an author from listings -> Navigate to /authors/lina-bautista.html -> View author biography and details -> View collection of articles by the author

Navigate to /authors/ -> View author listings -> Select an author from listings -> Navigate to /authors/rachel-nguyen.html -> View author biography and details -> View collection of articles by the author

features.name: View Author Profile
features.description: Readers can open an individual author's profile page to read the bio and browse all articles authored by that person.
user_flows: Navigate to /authors/little-smart-genius.html -> View author biography and details -> View collection of articles by the author

Navigate to /authors/ -> View author listings -> Select an author from listings -> Navigate to /authors/david-moreau.html -> View author biography and details -> View collection of articles by the author

features.name: View Authors Directory
features.description: Users can view the main directory listing all authors.
user_interactions: Click on author profiles to navigate

features.name: View Author Profile
features.description: Detailed profile view for individual authors, showing their articles and bio.
user_interactions: View collection of articles by the author
